name: RAG Pipeline with pgvector
description: Build a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline using pgvector in PostgreSQL. Embed documents with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, store vectors in Postgres, and use cosine similarity search to inject context into prompts.

steps.description: Install AI SDK, ORM, and Postgres client

steps.target: psql -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;"
steps.description: Enable pgvector extension in your Postgres database
Create documents table with content TEXT and embedding vector(1536) columns
Create embedText() function using text-embedding-3-small, returns Float32Array
Create ingest() that chunks documents, embeds each chunk, and upserts to DB
Create semanticSearch(query, limit) using cosine similarity operator (<=>)
Create RAG API route: search → inject context → stream answer with citations
Create ingestion script that loads markdown files from /docs and ingests them
Ingest sample documents and verify embeddings stored
